MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-03-2020 -- APPEARANCE BY JASON W. KLAWITTER, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC; HOMAIRA KHALJI, ESQ. (VIA COURTCALL) FOR DEFENDANT KHINE WIN - CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON NOV-16-2020 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 PER PARTIES' ORAL REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. PARTIES TO PAY/POST THE $60.00 FEE VIA E-FILING FOR THE SAID ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE. ALTHOUGH THE PARTIES INDICATED THAT THEY WILL SPLIT THE COST OF THE FEE, THE COURT REQUESTED THE PARTIES TO ARRANGE THE PAYMENT AMONGST EACH OTHER AND THAT ONLY ONE PARTY SHOULD SUBMIT THE PAYMENT TO THE COURT. PARTIES WAIVE NOTICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
